name: Mexican Chicken Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil the chicken until it is tender.
2. Remove the chicken and reserve the broth.
3. Remove the skin and any bones from the chicken and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Grate the cheese and add to a bowl with the chopped onion, garlic salt, and chili powder.
5. Combine the grated cheese mixture with the cooked chicken, onions, cream of mushroom soup, and Rotel tomatoes.
6. Place softened tortillas in a large baking dish lined with parchment paper or foil.
7. Add the chicken mixture on top of the tortillas.
8. Pour 2 cans of cream of chicken soup over the chicken.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes, or until bubbly and hot.
